parties.name: HOANG, JANIE 61 LEO STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janie Hoang in Propria Persona. Ruby Hoang (mother) also present.

The Court asked Ms. Hoang why she wants this. Ms. Hoang stated that she is enrolled in a state program, that she would like to change her name, that she recently found her original birth certificate but that the Safe at Home Program states that she must have a California birth certificate. The Court asked what the difference is between a birth certificate issued here as opposed to what she already has and that this seems to be an unreasonable rule. Ms. Hoang clarified that she has been given conflicting information by the clerks at Safe at Home, that one clerk says a California birth certificate is required and another says it is not. The Court stated that it cannot grant the relief requested, that it has considered what has been presented, that Ms. Hoang has made her best effort to comply with Safe at Home's request but the request to establish fact of birth is denied as a birth certificate already exists.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janie Hoang in Propria Persona.

Ms. Hoang reported that she is enrolled in a program called Safe at Home and that she needs a birth certificate for the state of California. Ms. Hoang presented a letter to the court written by her mother stating the time and date of her birth as well as a copy of a letter from the Safe at Home Program Administration. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
